Aquí tienes el archivo HTML completo. Cópialo tal cual, guárdalo como index.html y ábrelo en tu navegador o súbelo a GitHub Pages. Incluye registro, las 48 selecciones con escudos y banderas, las 6 fases, cascada de clasificados, bloqueo por fecha, y modo prueba para testear el bloqueo.

html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Quiniela Mundial 2026</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
<script>tailwind.config={theme:{extend:{fontFamily:{display:['Outfit','sans-serif'],body:['Space Grotesk','sans-serif']}}}}</script>
<style>
:root{--bg:#08090b;--bg2:#10121a;--card:#151820;--brd:#1f2330;--brd2:#2a2f3d;--acc:#d4a853;--acc2:#e0be6a;--aG:rgba(212,168,83,.1);--grn:#10b981;--txt:#eae8e3;--txt2:#9ca3af;--mut:#6b7280;--dng:#ef4444}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt);min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--brd);border-radius:3px}
#heroCanvas{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0}
.heroSec{position:relative;min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#08090b 0%,#0d0f18 35%,#111425 65%,#08090b 100%)}
.heroOv{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 15%,rgba(212,168,83,.07),transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 85%,rgba(16,185,129,.04),transparent 50%);z-index:1}
.heroCt{position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;max-width:580px;padding:20px}
.authBox{background:rgba(21,24,32,.9);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);border:1px solid var(--brd);border-radius:16px;padding:36px;max-width:390px;margin:0 auto}
.fi{width:100%;padding:11px 14px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--brd);border-radius:9px;color:var(--txt);font-family:inherit;font-size:14px;outline:none;transition:.2s}.fi:focus{border-color:var(--acc);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--aG)}.fi::placeholder{color:var(--mut)}
.btnP{width:100%;padding:12px;background:var(--acc);color:#0a0a0a;font-family:'Outfit';font-weight:700;font-size:15px;border:none;border-radius:9px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}.btnP:hover{background:var(--acc2);transform:translateY(-1px)}.btnP:active{transform:translateY(0)}
.btnG{background:none;border:none;color:var(--acc);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;padding:4px 0;transition:.2s}.btnG:hover{color:var(--acc2)}
.sb{width:250px;background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--brd);display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;z-index:40;transition:transform .3s}
.ni{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:7px;color:var(--txt2);cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:1px;border:none;background:none;width:100%;text-align:left;font-family:inherit}.ni:hover{color:var(--txt);background:rgba(255,255,255,.035)}.ni.act{color:var(--acc);background:var(--aG)}
.niI{width:18px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0}
.nb{margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);color:var(--mut)}.ni.act .nb{background:rgba(212,168,83,.18);color:var(--acc)}
.lkI{margin-left:auto;color:var(--dng);font-size:9px}
.mc{flex:1;margin-left:250px;min-height:100vh;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(212,168,83,.016) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:28px 28px}
.topB{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:30;background:rgba(8,9,11,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--brd);padding:11px 22px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.pBar{flex:1;height:4px;background:var(--brd);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}.pFill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--acc),var(--acc2));border-radius:2px;transition:width .4s}
.gc{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--brd);border-radius:11px;overflow:hidden;transition:.2s}.gc:hover{border-color:var(--brd2)}
.gHd{padding:10px 14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(212,168,83,.06),transparent);border-bottom:1px solid var(--brd);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.sR{display:grid;grid-template-columns:20px 1fr 28px 28px 28px 32px 32px;gap:1px;padding:4px 14px;font-size:11px;align-items:center}
.sH{color:var(--mut);font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;padding:5px 14px 2px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--brd)}
.mR{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(31,35,48,.5);font-size:12px;gap:4px}
.mT{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0}.mT span{white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.mV{color:var(--mut);font-size:9px;flex-shrink:0;font-weight:700}
.rB{display:flex;gap:2px;flex-shrink:0}
.rBt{width:28px;height:24px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--brd);background:transparent;color:var(--mut);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:.12s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Outfit'}.rBt:hover{border-color:var(--brd2);color:var(--txt)}.rBt.on{background:var(--acc);border-color:var(--acc);color:#0a0a0a}.rBt:disabled{opacity:.3;cursor:not-allowed}
.sTabs{display:flex;gap:3px;margin-bottom:18px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:8px;padding:3px;width:fit-content}
.sTab{padding:7px 18px;border-radius:7px;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--txt2);font-family:inherit;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}.sTab:hover{color:var(--txt)}.sTab.on{background:var(--card);color:var(--acc);box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.km{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--brd);border-radius:11px;padding:16px;transition:.2s}.km:hover{border-color:var(--brd2)}
.kmL{font-size:10px;color:var(--mut);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:8px}
.kT{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid var(--brd);cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;font-size:13px}.kT:hover{border-color:var(--brd2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.015)}.kT.sel{border-color:var(--acc);background:var(--aG)}.kT.dis{opacity:.35;cursor:not-allowed;pointer-events:none}
.kT .ck{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--brd);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:.15s;font-size:9px;color:transparent;flex-shrink:0}.kT.sel .ck{border-color:var(--acc);background:var(--acc);color:#0a0a0a}
.kVS{text-align:center;font-size:9px;color:var(--mut);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;padding:1px 0}
.tBdg{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:28px;height:22px;border-radius:4px;font-size:8.5px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;font-family:'Outfit';letter-spacing:.3px}
.lockBox{text-align:center;padding:60px 20px}
.lockBan{background:rgba(239,68,68,.08);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:12.5px;color:#fca5a5}
.timeBan{background:rgba(212,168,83,.06);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,83,.12);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 16px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--acc2)}
.infoBan{background:rgba(16,185,129,.06);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.12);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 16px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:12px;color:#6ee7b7}
.champBox{text-align:center;padding:40px 24px;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(212,168,83,.08),rgba(212,168,83,.02));border:1px solid rgba(212,168,83,.15)}
.toastC{position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:200;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;pointer-events:none}
.toast{padding:10px 18px;border-radius:9px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:500;animation:tIn .3s ease,tOut .3s ease 2.7s forwards;backdrop-filter:blur(10px)}
.tS{background:rgba(16,185,129,.12);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.25);color:#6ee7b7}
.tE{background:rgba(239,68,68,.12);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.25);color:#fca5a5}
.tI{background:rgba(212,168,83,.12);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,83,.25);color:#dbb95e}
@keyframes tIn{from{transform:translateX(100%);opacity:0}to{transform:translateX(0);opacity:1}}
@keyframes tOut{from{opacity:1}to{transform:translateX(100%);opacity:0}}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.6;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.05)}}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}}
.sov{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:35}.sov.vis{display:block}
@media(max-width:768px){.sb{transform:translateX(-100%)}.sb.mo{transform:translateX(0)}.mc{margin-left:0}.cArea{padding:14px!important}.topB{padding:10px 14px}.sR{grid-template-columns:18px 1fr 24px 24px 24px 28px 28px;font-size:10px;padding:3px 8px}.mR{padding:4px 8px;font-size:11px}.rBt{width:24px;height:21px;font-size:9px}.authBox{margin:0 14px;padding:28px 20px}.tBdg{width:24px;height:20px;font-size:7.5px}}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*,*::before,*::after{animation-duration:.01ms!important;transition-duration:.01ms!important}}
*:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--acc);outline-offset:2px}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app"></div>
<div id="toasts" class="toastC"></div>
<script>
/* ============ DATOS DEL TORNEO ============ */
const GR=[
{n:'A',t:['Estados Unidos','Francia','Senegal','Nueva Zelanda']},
{n:'B',t:['México','Alemania','Nigeria','Perú']},
{n:'C',t:['Canadá','España','Camerún','Siria']},
{n:'D',t:['Argentina','Croacia','Egipto','Costa Rica']},
{n:'E',t:['Brasil','Inglaterra','Marruecos','Japón']},
{n:'F',t:['Uruguay','Portugal','Ghana','Corea del Sur']},
{n:'G',t:['Colombia','Países Bajos','Argelia','Irán']},
{n:'H',t:['Ecuador','Bélgica','Túnez','Arabia Saudita']},
{n:'I',t:['Chile','Italia','Costa de Marfil','Australia']},
{n:'J',t:['Qatar','Suiza','Polonia','Jamaica']},
{n:'K',t:['Emiratos Árabes','Dinamarca','Serbia','Panamá']},
{n:'L',t:['Irak','Austria','Turquía','Noruega']}
];
const MSI=[[0,1],[2,3],[0,2],[1,3],[0,3],[1,2]];
const FL={'Estados Unidos':'🇺🇸','Francia':'🇫🇷','Senegal':'🇸🇳','Nueva Zelanda':'🇳🇿','México':'🇲🇽','Alemania':'🇩🇪','Nigeria':'🇳🇬','Perú':'🇵🇪','Canadá':'🇨🇦','España':'🇪🇸','Camerún':'🇨🇲','Siria':'🇸🇾','Argentina':'🇦🇷','Croacia':'🇭🇷','Egipto':'🇪🇬','Costa Rica':'🇨🇷','Brasil':'🇧🇷','Inglaterra':'🇬🇧','Marruecos':'🇲🇦','Japón':'🇯🇵','Uruguay':'🇺🇾','Portugal':'🇵🇹','Ghana':'🇬🇭','Corea del Sur':'🇰🇷','Colombia':'🇨🇴','Países Bajos':'🇳🇱','Argelia':'🇩🇿','Irán':'🇮🇷','Ecuador':'🇪🇨','Bélgica':'🇧🇪','Túnez':'🇹🇳','Arabia Saudita':'🇸🇦','Chile':'🇨🇱','Italia':'🇮🇹','Costa de Marfil':'🇨🇮','Australia':'🇦🇺','Qatar':'🇶🇦','Suiza':'🇨🇭','Polonia':'🇵🇱','Jamaica':'🇯🇲','Emiratos Árabes':'🇦🇪','Dinamarca':'🇩🇰','Serbia':'🇷🇸','Panamá':'🇵🇦','Irak':'🇮🇶','Austria':'🇦🇹','Turquía':'🇹🇷','Noruega':'🇳🇴'};
const AB={'Estados Unidos':'USA','Francia':'FRA','Senegal':'SEN','Nueva Zelanda':'NZL','México':'MEX','Alemania':'GER','Nigeria':'NGA','Perú':'PER','Canadá':'CAN','España':'ESP','Camerún':'CMR','Siria':'SYR','Argentina':'ARG','Croacia':'CRO','Egipto':'EGY','Costa Rica':'CRC','Brasil':'BRA','Inglaterra':'ENG','Marruecos':'MAR','Japón':'JPN','Uruguay':'URU','Portugal':'POR','Ghana':'GHA','Corea del Sur':'KOR','Colombia':'COL','Países Bajos':'NED','Argelia':'ALG','Irán':'IRN','Ecuador':'ECU','Bélgica':'BEL','Túnez':'TUN','Arabia Saudita':'KSA','Chile':'CHI','Italia':'ITA','Costa de Marfil':'CIV','Australia':'AUS','Qatar':'QAT','Suiza':'SUI','Polonia':'POL','Jamaica':'JAM','Emiratos Árabes':'UAE','Dinamarca':'DEN','Serbia':'SRB','Panamá':'PAN','Irak':'IRQ','Austria':'AUT','Turquía':'TUR','Noruega':'NOR'};

/* Colores de escudo por selección */
const TC={};
(function(){const c=['#1a4b8c','#1a3a7a','#1a8a52','#2a2a40','#0a7a3e','#2a2a2a','#0a8a55','#cc2030','#cc2020','#b81020','#1a7a40','#b81020','#5a9ad0','#cc2020','#b81828','#1a3a7a','#2a8a30','#8a2030','#b82028','#2a2a80','#5ab0d8','#1a6a2a','#b81828','#b82838','#d4a020','#e87820','#1a6a38','#2a9a48','#d4b020','#c82838','#c81818','#1a7a38','#c82828','#1a8a48','#d88020','#c8a820','#8a1a38','#cc2020','#b81838','#1a9a3a','#1a7a38','#b81828','#b83038','#1a3878','#b81828','#b82838','#a81828'];
const names=Object.keys(AB);names.forEach((n,i)=>TC[n]=c[i% c.length])})();

/* Emparejamientos de llaves */
const R32D=[
{lb:'1°A vs Mejor 3° #1',h:{tp:'w',g:0},a:{tp:'3',rk:0}},{lb:'1°B vs Mejor 3° #2',h:{tp:'w',g:1},a:{tp:'3',rk:1}},
{lb:'1°C vs Mejor 3° #3',h:{tp:'w',g:2},a:{tp:'3',rk:2}},{lb:'1°D vs Mejor 3° #4',h:{tp:'w',g:3},a:{tp:'3',rk:3}},
{lb:'1°E vs Mejor 3° #5',h:{tp:'w',g:4},a:{tp:'3',rk:4}},{lb:'1°F vs Mejor 3° #6',h:{tp:'w',g:5},a:{tp:'3',rk:5}},
{lb:'1°G vs Mejor 3° #7',h:{tp:'w',g:6},a:{tp:'3',rk:7}},{lb:'1°H vs Mejor 3° #8',h:{tp:'w',g:7},a:{tp:'3',rk:7}},
{lb:'1°I vs 2°A',h:{tp:'w',g:8},a:{tp:'r',g:0}},{lb:'1°J vs 2°B',h:{tp:'w',g:9},a:{tp:'r',g:1}},
{lb:'1°K vs 2°C',h:{tp:'w',g:10},a:{tp:'r',g:2}},{lb:'1°L vs 2°D',h:{tp:'w',g:11},a:{tp:'r',g:3}},
{lb:'2°E vs 2°I',h:{tp:'r',g:4},a:{tp:'r',g:8}},{lb:'2°F vs 2°J',h:{tp:'r',g:5},a:{tp:'r',g:9}},
{lb:'2°G vs 2°K',h:{tp:'r',g:6},a:{tp:'r',g:10}},{lb:'2°H vs 2°L',h:{tp:'r',g:7},a:{tp:'r',g:11}}
];
const R16D=[[0,8],[1,9],[2,10],[3,11],[4,12],[5,13],[6,14],[7,15]];
const QFD=[[0,1],[2,3],[4,5],[6,7]];
const SFD=[[0,1],[2,3]];
const RN={'groups':'Fase de Grupos','r32':'32vos de Final','r16':'16vos de Final','qf':'Cuartos de Final','sf':'Semifinales','final':'Final','summary':'Mi Quiniela'};
const TOTAL=104;

/* ============ FECHAS LÍMITE (bloqueo de fases) ============ */
const LOCK_DATES={
groups:'2026-06-18T23:59:59',
r32:'2026-06-28T23:59:59',
r16:'2026-07-02T23:59:59',
qf:'2026-07-06T23:59:59',
sf:'2026-07-12T23:59:59',
final:'2026-07-19T21:00:00'
};

/* ============ ESTADO GLOBAL ============ */
let user=null, phase='groups', gTab=0, testLock=false;

/* ============ UTILIDADES ============ */
function toast(m,c='tI'){const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='toast '+c;d.textContent=m;document.getElementById('toasts').appendChild(d);setTimeout(()=>d.remove(),3200)}
function badge(n){return`<span class="tBdg" style="background:${TC[n]||'#444'}">${AB[n]||'???'}</span>`}
function tDisp(n){return`${FL[n]||''} ${badge(n)}`}
function isLocked(ph){if(testLock&&ph!=='summary')return true;const d=LOCK_DATES[ph];return d?new Date()>new Date(d):false}
function timeLeft(ph){const d=new Date(LOCK_DATES[ph]),n=new Date(),df=d-n;if(df<=0)return null;const dd=Math.floor(df/864e5),hh=Math.floor((df%864e5)/36e5),mm=Math.floor((df%36e5)/6e4);return dd>0?`${dd}d ${hh}h`:hh>0?`${hh}h ${mm}m`:`${mm}m`}
function getUsers(){return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('wc26_u')||'{}')}
function saveUsers(u){localStorage.setItem('wc26_u',JSON.stringify(u))}
function getP(){return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('wc26_p_'+user)||'{"g":{},"r32":{},"r16":{},"qf":{},"sf":{},"f":null,"t":null}')}
function saveP(p){localStorage.setItem('wc26_p_'+user,JSON.stringify(p))}
function progress(p){let d=Object.keys(p.g).length+Object.keys(p.r32).length+Object.keys(p.r16).length+Object.keys(p.qf).length+Object.keys(p.sf).length+(p.f?1:0)+(p.t?1:0);return d}

/* ============ AUTENTICACIÓN ============ */
function doRegister(e,p,cp){
if(!e||!p)return toast('Completa todos los campos','tE');
if(!/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(e))return toast('Correo electrónico no válido','tE');
if(p.length<6)return toast('La contraseña debe tener al menos 6 caracteres','tE');
if(p!==cp)return toast('Las contraseñas no coinciden','tE');
const u=getUsers();if(u[e])return toast('Este correo ya está registrado','tE');
u[e]={p:btoa(p)};saveUsers(u);user=e;sessionStorage.setItem('wc26_s',e);
toast('Cuenta creada exitosamente','tS');render();
}
function doLogin(e,p){
if(!e||!p)return toast('Completa todos los campos','tE');
const u=getUsers();if(!u[e]||u[e].p!==btoa(p))return toast('Correo o contraseña incorrectos','tE');
user=e;sessionStorage.setItem('wc26_s',e);toast('Bienvenido de vuelta','tS');render();
}
function doLogout(){user=null;sessionStorage.removeItem('wc26_s');render()}

/* ============ LÓGICA DE PREDICCIONES ============ */
function calcStandings(gi,preds){
const teams=GR[gi].t.map(n=>({n,pts:0,gd:0,gf:0,ga:0}));
MSI.forEach((m,mi)=>{
const k=gi+'_'+mi,r=preds.g[k];let gh=0,ga=0;
if(r==='1'){gh=2;ga=0;teams[m[0]].pts+=3}
else if(r==='X'){gh=1;ga=1;teams[m[0]].pts+=1;teams[m[1]].pts+=1}
else if(r==='2'){gh=0;ga=2;teams[m[1]].pts+=3}
teams[m[0]].gf+=gh;teams[m[0]].ga+=ga;teams[m[0]].gd+=gh-ga;
teams[m[1]].gf+=ga;teams[m[1]].ga+=gh;teams[m[1]].gd+=ga-gh;
});
teams.sort((a,b)=>b.pts-a.pts||b.gd-a.gd||b.gf-a.gf||a.n.localeCompare(b.n));
return teams;
}
function getQualified(preds){
const all=GR.map((_,i)=>calcStandings(i,preds));
const w=all.map(s=>s[0].n),ru=all.map(s=>s[1].n);
const th=all.map(s=>s[2]);
th.sort((a,b)=>b.pts-a.pts||b.gd-a.gd||b.gf-a.gf||a.n.localeCompare(b.n));
return{w,ru,b3:th.slice(0,8).map(t=>t.n),all};
}
function resolveSlot(sl,q){return sl.tp==='w'?q.w[sl.g]:sl.tp==='r'?q.ru[sl.g]:q.b3[sl.rk]}
function getR32Teams(preds){const q=getQualified(preds);return R32D.map(m=>({home:resolveSlot(m.h,q),away:resolveSlot(m.a,q),lb:m.lb}))}
function getNextTeams(pp,pt,bk){return bk.map(([h,a])=>({home:pp[h]||pt[h].home,away:pp[a]||pt[a].away,lb:pt[h].home+' vs '+pt[a].away}))}
function gDone(p){return Object.keys(p.g).length===72}
function phDone(p,k){if(k==='r32')return Object.keys(p.r32).length===16;if(k==='r16')return Object.keys(p.r16).length===8;if(k==='qf')return Object.keys(p.qf).length===4;if(k==='sf')return Object.keys(p.sf).length===2;return false}
function validPred(preds,sk,i,h,a){const s=preds[sk][i];return(s===h||s===a)?s:null}
function cleanPreds(preds){
if(gDone(preds)){
const t32=getR32Teams(preds);
for(let i=0;i<16;i++){const v=preds.r32[i];if(v&&v!==t32[i].home&&v!==t32[i].away)delete preds.r32[i]}
if(phDone(preds,'r32')){
const t16=getNextTeams(preds.r32,t32,R16D);
for(let i=0;i<8;i++){const v=preds.r16[i];if(v&&v!==t16[i].home&&v!==t16[i].away)delete preds.r16[i]}
if(phDone(preds,'r16')){
const tq=getNextTeams(preds.r16,t16,QFD);
for(let i=0;i<4;i++){const v=preds.qf[i];if(v&&v!==tq[i].home&&v!==tq[i].away)delete preds.qf[i]}
if(phDone(preds,'qf')){
const ts=getNextTeams(preds.qf,tq,SFD);
for(let i=0;i<2;i++){const v=preds.sf[i];if(v&&v!==ts[i].home&&v!==ts[i].away)delete preds.sf[i]}
if(phDone(preds,'sf')){
const sf0=preds.sf[0],sf1=preds.sf[1];
if(sf0&&sf0!==ts[0].home&&sf0!==ts[0].away){delete preds.sf[0];preds.f=null;preds.t=null}
if(sf1&&sf1!==ts[1].home&&sf1!==ts[1].away){delete preds.sf[1];preds.f=null;preds.t=null}
if(preds.f&&preds.f!==ts[0].home&&preds.f!==ts[0].away&&preds.f!==ts[1].home&&preds.f!==ts[1].away)preds.f=null;
if(preds.t){const l0=sf0?(sf0===ts[0].home?ts[0].away:ts[0].home):ts[0].away;const l1=sf1?(sf1===ts[1].home?ts[1].away:ts[1].home):ts[1].away;if(preds.t!==l0&&preds.t!==l1)preds.t=null}
}
}
}
}
}else{preds.r32={};preds.r16={};preds.qf={};preds.sf={};preds.f=null;preds.t=null}
}

/* ============ SIDEBAR ============ */
function toggleSb(){document.getElementById('sb').classList.toggle('mo');document.getElementById('sov').classList.toggle('vis')}
function setPhase(p){phase=p;gTab=0;render()}

/* ============ CANVAS HERO ============ */
function initHero(){
const c=document.getElementById('heroCanvas');if(!c)return;
const ctx=c.getContext('2d');let w,h,pts=[];
function rs(){w=c.width=c.offsetWidth;h=c.height=c.offsetHeight}
rs();window.addEventListener('resize',rs);
for(let i=0;i<55;i++)pts.push({x:Math.random()*2000,y:Math.random()*2000,r:Math.random()*1.8+.4,dx:(Math.random()-.5)*.25,dy:(Math.random()-.5)*.25,a:Math.random()*.4+.08});
(function draw(){
ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
pts.forEach(p=>{p.x+=p.dx;p.y+=p.dy;if(p.x<0)p.x=w;if(p.x>w)p.x=0;if(p.y<0)p.y=h;if(p.y>h)p.y=0;
ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(212,168,83,${p.a})`;ctx.fill()});
requestAnimationFrame(draw)})();
}

/* ============ RENDERIZADO PRINCIPAL ============ */
function render(){
const app=document.getElementById('app');
if(!user){app.innerHTML=renderAuth();bindAuth();initHero();return}
const p=getP(),pr=progress(p),pc=Math.round(pr/TOTAL*100);
app.innerHTML=`<div class="flex min-h-screen">
<aside id="sb" class="sb">
<div class="p-4 border-b" style="border-color:var(--brd)">
<div class="font-display font-900 text-lg" style="color:var(--acc)">MUNDIAL 2026</div>
<div class="text-[10px] mt-0.5" style="color:var(--mut)">Quiniela Interactiva</div>
</div>
<nav class="flex-1 p-2.5 overflow-y-auto">${navI('groups','fa-table-cells','Fase de Grupos','72',p)}
${navI('r32','fa-forward','32vos de Final','16',p)}${navI('r16','fa-shuffle','16vos de Final','8',p)}
${navI('qf','fa-sitemap','Cuartos de Final','4',p)}${navI('sf','fa-code-branch','Semifinales','2',p)}
${navI('final','fa-trophy','Final','2',p)}
<div class="my-2 mx-1" style="border-top:1px solid var(--brd)"></div>
${navI('summary','fa-list-check','Mi Quiniela','',p)}
<div class="my-2 mx-1" style="border-top:1px solid var(--brd)"></div>
<button class="ni${testLock?' act':''}" onclick="testLock=!testLock;render()">
<i class="fa-solid fa-flask niI"></i><span>Modo prueba</span>
<span class="nb">${testLock?'ON':'OFF'}</span></button></nav>
<div class="p-3.5 border-t" style="border-color:var(--brd)">
<div class="text-[11px] truncate mb-1.5" style="color:var(--txt2)">${user}</div>
<button onclick="doLogout()" class="ni" style="padding:7px 12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--dng)"><i class="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket niI"></i>Cerrar sesión</button>
</div>
</aside>
<div id="sov" class="sov" onclick="toggleSb()"></div>
<div class="mc">
<div class="topB">
<button onclick="toggleSb()" class="md:hidden text-base" style="color:var(--txt2);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer"><i class="fa-solid fa-bars"></i></button>
<div class="font-display font-700 text-sm" style="color:var(--acc)">${RN[phase]}</div>
<div class="pBar"><div class="pFill" style="width:${pc}%"></div></div>
<div class="text-xs font-600" style="color:var(--txt2)">${pr}/${TOTAL}</div>
</div>
<div class="cArea" style="padding:24px">${renderPhase(p)}</div>
</div></div>`;
document.getElementById('sov').onclick=toggleSb;bindPhase(p);
}
function navI(id,ic,lb,bg,p){
const dn=id==='groups'?Object.keys(p.g).length:id==='r32'?Object.keys(p.r32).length:id==='r16'?Object.keys(p.r16).length:id==='qf'?Object.keys(p.qf).length:id==='sf'?Object.keys(p.sf).length:id==='final'?((p.f?1:0)+(p.t?1:0)):0;
const tl=id==='groups'?72:id==='r32'?16:id==='r16'?8:id==='qf'?4:id==='sf'?2:2;
const lk=isLocked(id);
return`<button class="ni${phase===id?' act':''}" onclick="setPhase('${id}')">
<i class="fa-solid ${ic} niI"></i><span>${lb}</span>
${bg?`<span class="nb">${dn}/${tl}</span>`:''}
${lk?'<i class="fa-solid fa-lock lkI"></i>':''}</button>`;
}

/* ============ PÁGINA DE AUTENTICACIÓN ============ */
function renderAuth(){
return`<section class="heroSec">
<canvas id="heroCanvas"></canvas>
<div class="heroOv"></div>
<div class="heroCt">
<div class="mb-10" style="animation:float 4s ease-in-out infinite">
<div class="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl mb-5" style="background:var(--aG);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,83,.15)">
<i class="fa-solid fa-trophy text-4xl" style="color:var(--acc);animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite"></i>
</div>
<h1 class="font-display font-900 text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-3" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc),#f0d78c,var(--acc));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent">QUINIELA<br>MUNDIAL 2026</h1>
<p class="text-sm md:text-base" style="color:var(--txt2);max-width:400px;margin:0 auto">Predice los resultados de las 104 selecciones. Demuestra que eres el mejor analista del fútbol mundial.</p>
</div>
<div class="authBox">
<div class="text-left mb-5">
<h2 class="font-display font-800 text-lg mb-0.5" id="aTitle">Iniciar sesión</h2>
<p class="text-xs" style="color:var(--mut)" id="aSub">Ingresa tus datos para continuar</p>
</div>
<div class="mb-3"><label class="block text-xs font-600 mb-1.5" style="color:var(--txt2)">Correo electrónico</label>
<input id="ae" type="email" class="fi" placeholder="tu@correo.com" autocomplete="email"></div>
<div class="mb-3"><label class="block text-xs font-600 mb-1.5" style="color:var(--txt2)">Contraseña</label>
<input id="ap" type="password" class="fi" placeholder="Mínimo 6 caracteres" autocomplete="current-password"></div>
<div id="cpW" class="mb-3 hidden"><label class="block text-xs font-600 mb-1.5" style="color:var(--txt2)">Confirmar contraseña</label>
<input id="acp" type="password" class="fi" placeholder="Repite tu contraseña" autocomplete="new-password"></div>
<button id="aBtn" class="btnP mb-3">Entrar</button>
<div class="text-center"><span class="text-xs" style="color:var(--mut)" id="aTgt">No tienes cuenta?</span>
<button id="aTog" class="btnG ml-1">Regístrate</button></div>
</div>
<div class="mt-8 flex justify-center gap-6 text-[11px]" style="color:var(--mut)">
<span><i class="fa-solid fa-users mr-1"></i>48 Selecciones</span>
<span><i class="fa-solid fa-futbol mr-1"></i>104 Partidos</span>
<span><i class="fa-solid fa-earth-americas mr-1"></i>3 Sedes</span>
</div>
</div></section>`;
}
let aMode='login';
function bindAuth(){
const btn=document.getElementById('aBtn'),tgt=document.getElementById('aTgt'),tog=document.getElementById('aTog'),cpw=document.getElementById('cpW'),tit=document.getElementById('aTitle'),sub=document.getElementById('aSub');
const upd=()=>{if(aMode==='login'){btn.textContent='Entrar';tgt.textContent='No tienes cuenta?';tog.textContent='Regístrate';cpw.classList.add('hidden');tit.textContent='Iniciar sesión';sub.textContent='Ingresa tus datos para continuar'}else{btn.textContent='Crear cuenta';tgt.textContent='Ya tienes cuenta?';tog.textContent='Inicia sesión';cpw.classList.remove('hidden');tit.textContent='Crear cuenta';sub.textContent='Regístrate para participar'}};
upd();tog.onclick=()=>{aMode=aMode==='login'?'reg':'login';upd()};
btn.onclick=()=>{const e=document.getElementById('ae').value.trim(),p=document.getElementById('ap').value;if(aMode==='login')doLogin(e,p);else doRegister(e,p,document.getElementById('acp').value)};
['ae','ap','acp'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.addEventListener('keydown',ev=>{if(ev.key==='Enter')btn.click()})});
}

/* ============ RENDERIZADO DE FASES ============ */
function renderPhase(p){
if(phase==='groups')return renderGroups(p);
if(phase==='r32'){if(!gDone(p))return lockMsg('Completa la Fase de Grupos para desbloquear');return renderKO(p,'r32',getR32Teams(p),'r32',16)}
if(phase==='r16'){if(!phDone(p,'r32'))return lockMsg('Completa los 32vos de Final para desbloquear');return renderKO(p,'r16',getNextTeams(p.r32,getR32Teams(p),R16D),'r16',8)}
if(phase==='qf'){if(!phDone(p,'r16'))return lockMsg('Completa los 16vos de Final para desbloquear');const t16=getNextTeams(p.r32,getR32Teams(p),R16D);return renderKO(p,'qf',getNextTeams(p.r16,t16,QFD),'qf',4)}
if(phase==='sf'){if(!phDone(p,'qf'))return lockMsg('Completa los Cuartos de Final para desbloquear');const t16=getNextTeams(p.r32,getR32Teams(p),R16D);const tq=getNextTeams(p.r16,t16,QFD);return renderKO(p,'sf',getNextTeams(p.qf,tq,SFD),'sf',2)}
if(phase==='final'){if(!phDone(p,'sf'))return lockMsg('Completa las Semifinales para desbloquear');const t16=getNextTeams(p.r32,getR32Teams(p),R16D);const tq=getNextTeams(p.r16,t16,QFD);const ts=getNextTeams(p.qf,tq,SFD);return renderFinal(p,ts)}
if(phase==='summary')return renderSummary(p);
return'';
}
function lockMsg(m){
return`<div class="lockBox"><i class="fa-solid fa-lock block mb-4" style="font-size:44px;color:var(--mut)"></i>
<div class="font-display font-700 text-lg mb-2">${m}</div>
<div class="text-sm" style="color:var(--txt2)">Debes completar las fases anteriores para acceder a esta etapa.</div></div>`;
}

/* ============ FASE DE GRUPOS ============ */
function renderGroups(preds){
const tabs=['Grupos A - D','Grupos E - H','Grupos I - L'];
const lk=isLocked('groups'),tl=timeLeft('groups'),s=gTab*4,e=s+4;
let h=`<h2 class="font-display font-800 text-2xl mb-1">Fase de Grupos</h2>
<p class="text-sm mb-4" style="color:var(--txt2)">Predice el resultado de cada partido: Local (1), Empate (X) o Visitante (2)</p>`;
if(lk)h+=`<div class="lockBan"><i class="fa-solid fa-lock"></i><span>Esta fase está bloqueada. Ya no se pueden modificar las predicciones.</span></div>`;
else if(tl)h+=`<div class="timeBan"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock"></i><span>Tiempo restante: <strong>${tl}</strong></span></div>`;
h+=`<div class="sTabs">${tabs.map((t,i)=>`<button class="sTab${gTab===i?' on':''}" data-gt="${i}">${t}</button>`).join('')}</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4">`;
for(let gi=s;gi<e;gi++){
const st=calcStandings(gi,preds),dn=Object.keys(preds.g).filter(k=>k.startsWith(gi+'_')).length;
h+=`<div class="gc"><div class="gHd"><span class="font-display font-800 text-base" style="color:var(--acc)">Grupo ${GR[gi].n}</span>
<span class="text-[11px]" style="color:${dn===6?'var(--grn)':'var(--mut)'}">${dn}/6</span></div>
<div class="sH"><span></span><span>Equipo</span><span class="text-center">PJ</span><span class="text-center">G</span><span class="text-center">E</span><span class="text-center">DG</span><span class="text-center">Pts</span></div>`;
st.forEach((t,i)=>{
const c=i<2?'color:var(--grn)':i===2?'color:var(--acc)':'color:var(--mut)';
const w=t.pts>=3?Math.floor(t.pts/3):0,d=t.pts%3===1?1:0;
h+=`<div class="sR"><span style="${c};font-weight:700">${i+1}</span>
<span class="flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="text-[13px]">${FL[t.n]||''}</span>${badge(t.n)}</span>
<span class="text-center" style="color:var(--txt2)">3</span><span class="text-center" style="color:var(--txt2)">${w}</span>
<span class="text-center" style="color:var(--txt2)">${d}</span>
<span class="text-center" style="${t.gd>0?'color:var(--grn)':t.gd<0?'color:var(--dng)':'color:var(--txt2)'}">${t.gd>0?'+':''}${t.gd}</span>
<span class="text-center font-700" style="${c}">${t.pts}</span></div>`;
});
MSI.forEach((m,mi)=>{
const k=gi+'_'+mi,sel=preds.g[k]||'';
h+=`<div class="mR"><div class="mT"><span>${FL[GR[gi].t[m[0]]]||''} ${badge(GR[gi].t[m[0]])}</span>
<span class="mV">VS</span><span>${FL[GR[gi].t[m[1]]]||''} ${badge(GR[gi].t[m[1]])}</span></div>
<div class="rB"><button class="rBt${sel==='1'?' on':''}" data-gk="${k}" data-gv="1" ${lk?'disabled':''}>1</button>
<button class="rBt${sel==='X'?' on':''}" data-gk="${k}" data-gv="X" ${lk?'disabled':''}>X</button>
<button class="rBt${sel==='2'?' on':''}" data-gk="${k}" data-gv="2" ${lk?'disabled':''}>2</button></div></div>`;
});
h+=`</div>`;
}
h+=`</div>`;return h;
}

/* ============ FASES ELIMINATORIAS (reutilizable) ============ */
function renderKO(preds,sk,teams,pk,total){
const lk=isLocked(pk),tl=timeLeft(pk);
let h=`<h2 class="font-display font-800 text-2xl mb-1">${RN[pk]}</h2>
<p class="text-sm mb-2" style="color:var(--txt2)">Selecciona el ganador de cada partido</p>
<div class="infoBan"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i><span>Los equipos se calculan automáticamente según tus predicciones de fases anteriores.</span></div>`;
if(lk)h+=`<div class="lockBan"><i class="fa-solid fa-lock"></i><span>Esta fase está bloqueada.</span></div>`;
else if(tl)h+=`<div class="timeBan"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock"></i><span>Tiempo restante: <strong>${tl}</strong></span></div>`;
h+=`<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4">`;
teams.forEach((m,i)=>{
const sel=validPred(preds,sk,i,m.home,m.away);
h+=`<div class="km"><div class="kmL">${m.lb}</div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
<div class="kT${sel===m.home?' sel':''}${lk?' dis':''}" data-ks="${sk}" data-ki="${i}" data-kv="${m.home}">
<span class="text-base">${FL[m.home]||''}</span><span class="flex-1 font-500">${badge(m.home)} ${m.home}</span>
<div class="ck"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div></div>
<div class="kVS">VS</div>
<div class="kT${sel===m.away?' sel':''}${lk?' dis':''}" data-ks="${sk}" data-ki="${i}" data-kv="${m.away}">
<span class="text-base">${FL[m.away]||''}</span><span class="flex-1 font-500">${badge(m.away)} ${m.away}</span>
<div class="ck"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div></div>
</div></div>`;
});
h+=`</div>`;return h;
}

/* ============ FINAL ============ */
function renderFinal(preds,sft){
const lk=isLocked('final'),tl=timeLeft('final');
const ch=preds.f,th=preds.t;
const sf0=preds.sf[0],sf1=preds.sf[1];
const l0=sf0?(sf0===sft[0].home?sft[0].away:sft[0].home):sft[0].away;
const l1=sf1?(sf1===sft[1].home?sft[1].away:sft[1].home):sft[1].away;
let h=`<h2 class="font-display font-800 text-2xl mb-1">Final</h2>
<p class="text-sm mb-4" style="color:var(--txt2)">Predice al campeón y al tercer lugar</p>`;
if(lk)h+=`<div class="lockBan"><i class="fa-solid fa-lock"></i><span>Esta fase está bloqueada.</span></div>`;
else if(tl)h+=`<div class="timeBan"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock"></i><span>Tiempo restante: <strong>${tl}</strong></span></div>`;
h+=`<div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-5">
<div class="km" style="border-color:${th?'var(--acc)':'var(--brd)'}">
<div class="kmL"><i class="fa-solid fa-medal mr-1" style="color:#cd7f32"></i>Tercer Puesto</div>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
<div class="kT${th===l0?' sel':''}${lk?' dis':''}" data-ks="t" data-ki="-1" data-kv="${l0}">
<span class="text-base">${FL[l0]||''}</span><span class="flex-1 font-500">${badge(l0)} ${l0}</span>
<div class="ck"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div></div>
<div class="kVS">VS</div>
<div class="kT${th===l1?' sel':''}${lk?' dis':''}" data-ks="t" data-ki="-1" data-kv="${l1}">
<span class="text-base">${FL[l1]||''}</span><span class="flex-1 font-500">${badge(l1)} ${l1}</span>
<div class="ck"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div></div>
</div></div>
<div class="km" style="border-color:${ch?'var(--acc)':'var(--brd)'}">
<div class="kmL"><i class="fa-solid fa-trophy mr-1" style="color:var(--acc)"></i>Gran Final</div>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
<div class="kT${ch===sft[0].home?' sel':''}${lk?' dis':''}" data-ks="f" data-ki="-1" data-kv="${sft[0].home}">
<span class="text-base">${FL[sft[0].home]||''}</span><span class="flex-1 font-500">${badge(sft[0].home)} ${sft[0].home}</span>
<div class="ck"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div></div>
<div class="kVS">VS</div>
<div class="kT${ch===sft[0].away?' sel':''}${lk?' dis':''}" data-ks="f" data-ki="-1" data-kv="${sft[0].away}">
<span class="text-base">${FL[sft[0].away]||''}</span><span class="flex-1 font-500">${badge(sft[0].away)} ${sft[0].away}</span>
<div class="ck"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div></div>
</div></div></div>`;
if(ch){
h+=`<div class="champBox mt-6">
<i class="fa-solid fa-trophy text-5xl mb-3 block" style="color:var(--acc);animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite"></i>
<div class="text-sm mb-2" style="color:var(--mut)">Tu campeón predicho</div>
<div class="font-display font-900 text-3xl md:text-4xl mb-1">${FL[ch]||''} ${ch}</div>
<div class="mt-3">${badge(ch)}</div>
</div>`;
}
return h;
}

/* ============ RESUMEN / QUINIELA COMPLETA ============ */
function renderSummary(preds){
const pr=progress(preds),pc=Math.round(pr/TOTAL*100);
let h=`<h2 class="font-display font-800 text-2xl mb-1">Mi Quiniela</h2>
<p class="text-sm mb-5" style="color:var(--txt2)">Resumen completo de todas tus predicciones</p>`;
/* Campeón */
if(preds.f){
h+=`<div class="champBox mb-6">
<i class="fa-solid fa-trophy text-5xl mb-3 block" style="color:var(--acc)"></i>
<div class="text-sm mb-1" style="color:var(--mut)">Tu campeón</div>
<div class="font-display font-900 text-3xl md:text-4xl">${FL[preds.f]||''} ${preds.f}</div>
${preds.t?`<div class="mt-3 text-sm" style="color:var(--txt2)">Tercer lugar: ${FL[preds.t]||''} ${preds.t}</div>`:''}
</div>`;
}
/* Progreso */
h+=`<div class="p-5 rounded-xl mb-6" style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--brd)">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2"><span class="font-display font-700">Completado</span>
<span class="font-display font-800 text-lg" style="color:var(--acc)">${pc}%</span></div>
<div class="pBar" style="height:8px;border-radius:4px"><div class="pFill" style="width:${pc}%;border-radius:4px"></div></div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mt-4 text-center text-xs" style="color:var(--txt2)">
<div><div class="font-700 text-base" style="color:var(--txt)">${Object.keys(preds.g).length}/72</div>Grupos</div>
<div><div class="font-700 text-base" style="color:var(--txt)">${Object.keys(preds.r32).length+Object.keys(preds.r16).length+Object.keys(preds.qf).length+Object.keys(preds.sf).length}/30</div>Eliminatorias</div>
<div><div class="font-700 text-base" style="color:var(--txt)">${(preds.f?1:0)+(preds.t?1:0)}/2</div>Final</div>
</div></div>`;
/* Grupos */
h+=`<h3 class="font-display font-700 text-base mb-3" style="color:var(--acc)">Fase de Grupos</h3>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-6">`;
GR.forEach((g,gi)=>{
const st=calcStandings(gi,preds),dn=Object.keys(preds.g).filter(k=>k.startsWith(gi+'_')).length;
h+=`<div class="p-3 rounded-lg" style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--brd)">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2"><span class="font-display font-700 text-sm" style="color:var(--acc)">Grupo ${g.n}</span>
<span class="text-[10px]" style="color:${dn===6?'var(--grn)':'var(--mut)'}">${dn}/6</span></div>
<div class="space-y-1">`;
st.forEach((t,i)=>{
const c=i===0?'var(--grn)':i===1?'var(--grn)':i===2?'var(--acc)':'var(--mut)';
const lb=i===0?'1°':i===1?'2°':i===2?'3°':'4°';
h+=`<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs"><span style="color:${c};font-weight:700;width:16px">${lb}</span>
<span class="text-[12px]">${FL[t.n]||''}</span>${badge(t.n)}<span class="flex-1">${t.n}</span>
<span style="color:${c};font-weight:600">${t.pts} pts</span></div>`;
});
h+=`</div></div>`;
});
h+=`</div>`;
/* Eliminatorias */
if(gDone(preds)){
const t32=getR32Teams(preds);
h+=renderSummaryKO('32vos de Final',preds.r32,t32,16);
if(phDone(preds,'r32')){
const t16=getNextTeams(preds.r32,t32,R16D);
h+=renderSummaryKO('16vos de Final',preds.r16,t16,8);
if(phDone(preds,'r16')){
const tq=getNextTeams(preds.r16,t16,QFD);
h+=renderSummaryKO('Cuartos de Final',preds.qf,tq,4);
if(phDone(preds,'qf')){
const ts=getNextTeams(preds.qf,tq,SFD);
h+=renderSummaryKO('Semifinales',preds.sf,ts,2);
}
}
}
}else{
h+=`<div class="text-center py-6 text-sm" style="color:var(--mut)">Completa la fase de grupos para ver el resumen de eliminatorias.</div>`;
}
/* Estado de bloqueo */
h+=`<h3 class="font-display font-700 text-base mb-3 mt-6" style="color:var(--acc)">Estado de Fases</h3>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-2">`;
['groups','r32','r16','qf','sf','final'].forEach(k=>{
const lk=isLocked(k);
h+=`<div class="p-3 rounded-lg text-xs" style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid ${lk?'rgba(239,68,68,.2)':'var(--brd)'}">
<div class="font-600 mb-1">${RN[k]}</div>
<div style="color:${lk?'var(--dng)':'var(--grn)'}">${lk?'<i class="fa-solid fa-lock mr-1"></i>Bloqueada':'<i class="fa-solid fa-lock-open mr-1"></i>Abierta'}</div>
</div>`;
});
h+=`</div>`;
return h;
}
function renderSummaryKO(title,preds,teams,total){
const dn=Object.keys(preds).length;
let h=`<h3 class="font-display font-700 text-base mb-2 mt-5" style="color:var(--acc)">${title}</h3>
<div class="p-4 rounded-xl mb-4" style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--brd)">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-3"><span class="text-xs" style="color:var(--txt2)">${dn}/${total} predichos</span></div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-1.5">`;
teams.forEach((m,i)=>{
const sel=preds[i]||null;
const isSel=sel===m.home||sel===m.away;
h+=`<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs p-2 rounded" style="background:${isSel?'var(--aG)':'transparent'}">
<span style="color:var(--mut);width:18px;text-align:center">${i+1}</span>
<span class="${isSel?'font-700':''}" style="${isSel?'color:var(--acc)':''}">${sel||'—'}</span>
<span style="color:var(--mut)" class="text-[10px] truncate flex-1">${m.lb}</span></div>`;
});
h+=`</div></div>`;return h;
}

/* ============ BINDING DE EVENTOS ============ */
function bindPhase(preds){
/* Tabs de grupos */
document.querySelectorAll('.sTab[data-gt]').forEach(b=>b.onclick=()=>{gTab=parseInt(b.dataset.gt);render()});
/* Predicciones de grupos (1/X/2) */
document.querySelectorAll('.rBt[data-gk]').forEach(b=>b.onclick=()=>{
if(b.disabled)return;
const p=getP(),k=b.dataset.gk,v=b.dataset.gv;
if(p.g[k]===v){delete p.g[k]}else{p.g[k]=v}
cleanPreds(p);saveP(p);render();
});
/* Predicciones eliminatorias (selección de equipo) */
document.querySelectorAll('.kT[data-ks]').forEach(b=>b.onclick=()=>{
if(b.classList.contains('dis'))return;
const p=getP(),sk=b.dataset.ks,ki=parseInt(b.dataset.ki),kv=b.dataset.kv;
if(sk==='f'){
p.f=p.f===kv?null:kv;
}else if(sk==='t'){
p.t=p.t===kv?null:kv;
}else{
if(p[sk][ki]===kv){delete p[sk][ki]}else{p[sk][ki]=kv}
}
saveP(p);render();
});
}

/* ============ INICIALIZACIÓN ============ */
(function init(){
const s=sessionStorage.getItem('wc26_s');
if(s){const u=getUsers();if(u[s])user=s}
render();
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

Para usarlo en GitHub Pages:

  1. Crea un repositorio en GitHub
  2. Sube este archivo como index.html en la raíz (o en una carpeta docs/)
  3. En Settings > Pages, selecciona la rama y carpeta
  4. Tu sitio estará en https://tusuario.github.io/tu-repo/

Funcionalidades incluidas:

  • Registro/Login con validación y persistencia por usuario en localStorage
  • 48 selecciones con banderas (emojis nativos del sistema) y escudos de colores únicos con abreviatura FIFA
  • 12 grupos de 4 equipos — 72 partidos con opciones 1 (local), X (empate), 2 (visitante)
  • Tabla de posiciones en tiempo real que se recalcula al cambiar cada predicción
  • 32vos de Final — 16 partidos con emparejamientos reales FIFA (1° de grupo vs mejores 3°)
  • 16vos, Cuartos, Semifinales — cascada automática de clasificados
  • Final + Tercer Puesto — selección del campeón
  • Actualización de clasificados: al modificar la fase de grupos, las predicciones de eliminatorias se limpian automáticamente si el equipo ya no clasifica
  • Bloqueo por fecha configurable (fechas del Mundial 2026 en LOCK_DATES) con cuenta regresiva
  • Modo Prueba en el sidebar para simular todas las fases bloqueadas
  • Mi Quiniela: resumen completo con campeón, progreso, tablas de grupos y bracket de eliminatorias
  • Página de inicio con animación de partículas doradas en canvas y formulario de registro
  • Todo en español latinoamericano — totalmente traducido
  • Responsivo — funciona en móvil, tablet y escritorio
  • Sin dependencias externas excepto Tailwind CSS, Google Fonts y Font Awesome por CDN

Para modificar las fechas de bloqueo, edita el objeto LOCK_DATES al inicio del script. Para cambiar los equipos o grupos, edita los arreglos GR, FL, AB y TC. Los escudos usan colores asignados por código hash del nombre — puedes personalizarlos cambiando el array c dentro de la función IIFE que genera TC.instrucción

Aquí tienes el archivo completo y funcional. Cópialo tal cual, guárdalo como index.html y ábrelo directamente en tu navegador para previsualizarlo, o súbelo a GitHub Pages.

HTML
Generate index.html
File
